title: Pillowy Vietnamese Rice Bowl
description: A grassy, pillowy, and romantic Vietnamese dish featuring brown rice as the main ingredient, perfect for a date night. This recipe is kosher-friendly and suitable for a dinner meal.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the vegetable broth and brown rice. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and cover with a lid.
Simmer the rice for 20 minutes, or until all the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
While the rice cooks, heat the coconut milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Stir in the chopped fresh herbs and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the herbs are wilted.
Once the rice is done cooking, fluff it with a fork to separate the grains.
To assemble the rice bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom of a bowl, then top with a spoonful of the herb-infused coconut milk mixture.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs and serve immediately.
